falsification_rule_text: Not supported if any documented hyperinflation episode (monthly inflation >= 50% per Cagan) occurred WITHOUT fiscal dominance being present in the preceding 24 months, as determined by the coding rule. A single counter-example falsifies the claim.

variables_missing.name: fiscal_dominance_indicator
variables_missing.source: constructed: (central_bank_direct_gov_financing > 0) AND (tax_revenue < 50% of gov_expenditure) AND (external_market_access = impaired)
